key_evidence: European Parliament 418-207 resolution May 20, 2026 urging Commission to trigger conditionality mechanism
Four-group supermajority consensus (EPP + S&D + Renew + Greens)
Same mechanism precedent: previously used against Hungary, resulted in €10.4B freeze
Explicit citations: special prosecution office dissolution, corruption penalty cuts, whistleblower office abolition attempt, EU funds misuse ('guesthouse projects')
Renew Europe separately demanded EU funds misuse investigation
EUobserver 'manual for autocrats' framing — explicit parallel to Hungary
methodology_note: Methodology-novel Ruling 5: EU-PARLIAMENTARY-URGING-OF-CONDITIONALITY-MECHANISM as Tier-1.5 formal apply category. Magnitude band -2.0 to -3.5; Slovakia at lower end (-2.0) per post-apply discipline (May 22 -5.5 just applied).
